历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 15227 → 15942 → 15263 → 17151 → 16253, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1000 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 16253, which has rebounded compared to 2024 but is still higher than the 2021–2023 levels; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province was 93 in 2021–2022, 95 in 2023, 100 in 2024, 108 in 2025, and increased to 114 in 2026, an expansion of 6 (+5.56%) compared to 2025, with consecutive years of expansion, which has a downward effect on rankings (increasing ranking numbers).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking: 52nd in 2021 → 49th in 2022 → 51st in 2023 → 49th in 2024 → 53rd in 2025 → 55th in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years but still among the top 100 nationally; 2023 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed (library confession wall incident); no negative incidents related to Nanjing Agricultural University in 2026 reputation data; Douyin popularity ranking 102nd, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure and stable application attention; no obvious record of filing gaps; Fifth round of discipline evaluation: Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A-, Animal Science A-, with outstanding agricultural and forestry disciplines, highly corresponding to the enrollment majors such as Agronomy, Plant Protection, Animal Medicine, and Food Science and Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have consistently high social popularity, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; the number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province increased from 117,464 in 2021 to 192,096 in 2025; total candidates in 2026 are 267,900, with an estimated Physics Category proportion of about 72%, approximately 192,888, a slight increase of about 0.4% compared to 2025, with basically unchanged competition; Nanjing Agricultural University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, in East China, geographically close to Fujian Province with convenient transportation, offering some regional appeal to Fujian candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Fujian Province is about 0.4% (approximately 25 out of 5,575 nationally in 2025), with stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the downward effect on rankings from the 2026 expansion of 6 (+5.56%), the basically unchanged number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province, and the slight decline in Soft Science ranking but strong disciplinary strength, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 16,253. The predicted minimum ranking is about 16,825, with a range of 16,325–17,325.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 16,325–17,325, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (especially Computer Science and Electronic Information, which are popular but require higher rankings), and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 16,300), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (around 17,300), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety. Nanjing Agricultural University's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in agriculture and forestry (Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A), and candidates interested in related majors should pay special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2488 → 2505 → 2839 → 3538 → 2932, stable around 2500 in 2021-2022, dropping to 2839 in 2023, sharply dropping to 3538 in 2024, and significantly rebounding to 2932 in 2025, showing a V-shaped fluctuation; the enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province was 13 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 15 in 2025, and sharply increasing to 19 in 2026, an expansion of 4 students (+26.67%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that will greatly lower the ranking (increase the ranking number).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 55th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, slightly declining in recent years but still among the top 100 nationally, still strongly attractive to History Category candidates; reputation evaluation in 2023 was neutral/mixed; no significant negative events in 2026 reputation data; Douyin popularity ranked 102nd, rated as 'average', with stable application attention; no record of History Category admission gaps; fifth round of discipline evaluation: Crop Science A+, Plant Protection A+, Food Science and Engineering A, Veterinary Medicine A-, Animal Husbandry A-, although mainly focused on agriculture and forestry, the 211 level still attracts liberal arts students; History Category majors mainly include Sociology, Public Administration, Finance, Japanese, and English.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors are socially popular; Finance/Economics is divided and wait-and-see; Fujian Province History Category candidates decreased from 77,795 in 2021 to 60,252 in 2025, a total decline of 22.6%; total candidates in 2026 are 267,900, estimated at about 64,300 based on the recent History Category proportion of about 24%, an increase of about 6.7% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Nanjing is located in East China, geographically close to Fujian, attracting some Fujian History Category candidates; the university's overall enrollment proportion in Fujian Province is about 0.4%, with a stable scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound trend in 2025 rankings, the large expansion of 26.67% (+4 students) in the 2026 History Category enrollment plan which will lower the ranking, and the slight increase in the number of History Category candidates in Fujian Province, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will move back from the 2025 ranking of 2932. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3351, with a range of 2851–3851.
